name: Endeavour Mining plc
description: Endeavour Mining is one of the world's largest gold producers focused exclusively on West Africa, with a portfolio of operating mines across Côte d'Ivoire, Burkina Faso, Senegal, and Mali. The company is dual-listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and the London Stock Exchange (TSX/LSE: EDV) and targets annual production of 1,090,000–1,265,000 oz gold. Endeavour is a fully integrated gold producer in the production stage with an active growth pipeline including the Assafou project.
